role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within the linguistic domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Sierra Nevada, fire damage).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Ponderosa, Aspen) and shrub types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (asphalt, shoulders, lack of markings).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Evaluated camera generation artifacts and road patching styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the USA. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (especially landscape and botanics), and the tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish the USA from the closest analog (Canada).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the fire-damaged slopes and granite terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately identified the visual characteristics of the pines and shrubs.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the road surface and lack of markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately noted the camera blur and road patching.
